title: Senior Python Backend Engineer (AWS Asset & Portfolio Mgmt Platform)
description: Cloud-based asset and portfolio management platform integrating financial reporting, property management systems, and workflow automation. AWS backend (Cognito/IAM, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB), FastAPI/Flask REST API, ETL pipelines for lender/bank + property manager reports (Yardi, Excel), Monday.com integration. Implementing services on defined architecture. >30 hrs/week, 3-6 months.
full_description: Cloud-based asset and portfolio management platform integrating financial reporting, property management systems, and workflow automation. AWS backend (Cognito/IAM, Lambda, S3, DynamoDB), FastAPI/Flask REST API, ETL pipelines for lender/bank + property manager reports (Yardi, Excel), Monday.com integration. Implementing services on defined architecture. >30 hrs/week, 3-6 months.
